name: Zhuhai Enpower Electric Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhuhai Enpower Electric Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of electric vehicle motor control systems. The company offers motor controllers, car chargers, DC-DC converters, and electronics. Its products are used in energy vehicles, low and medium speed electric vehicles, field electric vehicles, and other fields. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Zhuhai, China.
